extraction.one_line_summary: DANESE Alberto won sprint finish by tire width over MILAN Jonathan after peloton caught late solo REMSEN Senne at 5km to go.
tactical_patterns: MATTHEWS Michael launched sprint from distance, forcing faster sprinters to close gap and reducing their final acceleration reserves.
Jayco-AlUla positioned MATTHEWS through technical finale while Dutch teams delivered DANESE, suggesting corner knowledge advantage for Italian stage.
Peloton caught breakaway exactly 5km out, revealing sprint teams now calibrate effort to avoid early catch and chaotic positioning.

rider_signals.MILAN Jonathan: neutral: controlled intermediate sprint while already in virtual maglia ciclamino lead, prioritizing classification over stage hunting
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: competitive sprint finish against pure sprinters despite being classified as all-rounder shows current form peak
rider_signals.REMSEN Senne: neutral: solo attack from breakaway remnants at 22km revealed teams willing to let domestique attempt rather than chase aggressively
